debug_info.goal:
k : Type u_1
M : Type u_2
ι : Type u_3
inst✝⁴ : Ring k
inst✝³ : AddCommGroup M
inst✝² : Module k M
inst✝¹ : LE ι
M_ : ι → Submodule k M
inst✝ : IsFilterComplete M_
α : Type u_4
⊢ IsFilterComplete fun i => Submodule.pi Set.univ fun x => M_ i

failed_attempts:
constructor
  · constructor
    intro x hx
    funext a
    exact IsFilterHausdorff.haus' (x a) fun i => (Submodule.mem_pi.mp (hx i)) a trivial
  · constructor
    intro x hx
    have : ∀ a : α, ∃ L : M, ∀ i, x i a - L ∈ M_ i := by
      intro a
      apply IsFilterPrecomplete.prec' (fun i => x i a)
      intro i j hij
      obtain ⟨s, hs, t, ht, hst⟩ := AddSubgroup.mem_sup.mp (hx i j hij)
      rw [AddSubgroup.mem_ofClass] at hs ht
      apply AddSubgroup.mem_sup.mpr
      exact ⟨s a, AddSubgroup.mem_ofClass.mpr ((Submodule.mem_pi.mp hs) a trivial),
             t a, AddSubgroup.mem_ofClass.mpr ((Submodule.mem_pi.mp ht) a trivial),
             congr_fun hst a⟩
    choose L hL using this
    exact ⟨fun a => L a, fun i => Submodule.mem_pi.mpr fun a _ => hL a i⟩
